title: Anthropic's Brand New AI Just Started the Gold Rush (Fable 5)
summary: Cyril Imhof reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model, covering new AI use cases and agent design patterns. The video discusses capabilities, applications in regulated industries, and practical deployment strategies for AI systems.
writeup: Cyril Imhof reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, walking through its capabilities and the agent design patterns it enables. The video covers new use cases, including applications in regulated industries, and practical deployment strategies for AI systems. Concrete topics include long-running applications, context engineering, agentic AI, and a Know Your Agent approach.
